summary: Frontend-only test for Asadero El Gordo Feliz landing page. All 6 sections render, all interactive links (wa.me, tel:, Google Maps) have correct hrefs, navbar shows glassmorphism on scroll, floating WhatsApp transitions from hidden to visible after scrolling >280px, mobile hamburger menu opens with nav links. Tested both desktop (1440x900) and mobile (390x844) viewports. 32 checks passed, 5 minor failures (only outer section-wrapper data-testids missing — inner content/links all verified).
passed: home-page loaded on desktop and mobile
Hero H1 contains 'El auténtico sabor de la parrilla en Guadalupe'
hero-whatsapp-btn href = wa.me/528140015200 with encoded message
All 4 nav links present with correct anchors (inicio, menú→#menu, reseñas→#testimonios, ubicación→#ubicacion)
Navbar becomes glassmorphism (bg-white/85 + backdrop-blur) after scroll >24px
Floating WhatsApp opacity-0 initially, opacity-100 after scroll >280px
All 3 menu cards present with -order WhatsApp links
Footer contains business name and copyright year
Mobile (390w): hamburger toggle visible, opens mobile menu sheet with nav links + WhatsApp CTA

failed.issue: Outer section wrappers (hero, value-prop, menu-highlights, testimonials, contact) lack data-testid attributes on the <section> elements themselves. All inner testids work correctly though.
failed.evidence: page.query_selector('[data-testid="hero"]') returned null for hero/value-prop/menu-highlights/testimonials/contact wrappers — but inner elements (hero-whatsapp-btn, menu-card-0, testimonial-card-0, contact-map) all found and functional.

action_items: OPTIONAL (low priority): Add data-testid on outer <section> tags (hero, value-prop, menu-highlights, testimonials, contact) for easier section-level targeting in future tests. Not blocking — all functional elements and interactions are verified working.

success_rate.frontend: 86% (32/37 checks; 5 minor missing-testid items, no functional issues)
